meta.phase-name: Visual composer reusable blocks, dynamic data, and containers

highlights.item: Reusable insertion is now explicit in the block library: supported presets can be inserted as linked references or detached local copies, and the structure/preview surfaces label those states clearly.
Linked reusable blocks are code-backed presets resolved at render time, while detached copies keep their current content locally and can be edited inline after detaching.
Dynamic Grime Time blocks now have representative preview states and stay in the shared preview-first editing flow instead of disappearing into a structure-only taxonomy.
The first constrained container model is now formalized around content slots: editors can add/remove slots, set widths, edit slot copy inline, and publish validation flags empty containers.
`Custom HTML` is now a real block in the page schema, block registry, public renderer, preview surface, and publish validation path, with sanitizer-backed rendering instead of raw execution.
Phase 17 required and now includes a dedicated Payload migration for reusable metadata columns and the new custom-HTML block tables.

verification.command: npm.cmd exec eslint src/blocks/CustomHtml/config.ts src/blocks/CustomHtml/Component.tsx src/blocks/RenderBlocks.tsx src/collections/Pages/index.ts src/lib/pages/customHtml.ts src/lib/pages/pageComposerReusableBlocks.ts tests/int/lib/pages/page-composer.int.spec.ts tests/e2e/page-composer.e2e.spec.ts
set PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3111 && npm.cmd exec -- playwright test tests/e2e/page-composer.e2e.spec.ts --config=playwright.local.config.ts

next.item: No further composer phase is queued yet; any deeper reusable/container work should open a new planned phase instead of extending `17` informally.
